title: VoxelMC.eu Modpack
description: Technical modpack, bringing all types of mods together (with some fun to it!)
body:
### We have also a SMP server for this modpack!
**To connect to the SMP server, you need to fill out a form at [VoxelMC.eu Website](https://voxelmc.eu/) to join!!**

Reactor, that does kaboom? For sure! Popular polish "Bober" meme when you interact with animal? There it is! Planes & Cars, which look hillarious? It's there too!   

This modpack is a go-to when you want to play with your friends, discover new technology, build your heart out with Create mod and its addons, and have some fun with it (try sleeping ;) ). There aren't some "lame-o" mods for customization, just a lightweight RPC mod for Discord (which is fully editable!) and much, much mods just for gameplay.

## Servers
As mentioned above, we have a SMP server available to join (look at the top), but this modpack is ready to be installed on a server. (Current information: **Forge 1.20.1, version 47.4.0** is tested and working)
You might have to edit the mod list slightly (don't worry, it will tell you which mods are misbehaving - it's the cosmetics mods most of the time)
